description: Comprehensive Elasticsearch monitoring dashboard using Prometheus metrics from elasticsearch_exporter. Covers cluster health, index operations, search performance, JVM memory & GC, OS resources, network transport, and thread pool metrics.
title: Elasticsearch Monitoring Dashboard - Prometheus

widgets.description: Elasticsearch cluster health: green=0, yellow=1, red=2

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Cluster Health Status
